title: goodenia centralis
intro: Goodenia centralis, also known as Desert Goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, characterized by its small, white or purple flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Goodenia centralis lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of consuming Goodenia centralis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Goodenia centralis is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in topical creams and ointments used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
